---START-LESSON-DRAFT---
slug: 2026-05-18-jwt-refresh-staleness
---
name: jwt-refresh-staleness
description: JWT payload remains stale after refresh
source: daily-synthesis 2026-05-18
trigger_project: my-app
trigger_commit: abc1234
status: draft
---

## Trigger
JWT refresh sometimes returns same payload despite role change.

## Root cause
Cache key derives from token only, not from user version.

## Structural fix
Include user-version in cache key OR invalidate on role change.

## Bigger lesson
Любой cache по token'у — это implicit assumption что token = state. На refresh state может уйти вперёд токена.
---END-LESSON-DRAFT---

Trailing chatter that should be ignored.
